title: Stink Bug Control New Rochelle NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional stink bug control in New Rochelle, NY. Fast, effective stink bug removal for homes & businesses. Serving Westchester County. Call for same-day service!
intro: Stink bugs invading your New Rochelle home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective stink bug control services throughout New Rochelle and Westchester County. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate stink bug infestations and prevent future invasions, with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on the severity of your infestation.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving New Rochelle and the greater Westchester area, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique pest challenges facing local homeowners and businesses. Our licensed technicians provide thorough inspections, customized treatment plans, and guaranteed results to keep your property stink bug-free year-round.
localContext: New Rochelle's diverse housing stock—from historic homes near the North Avenue waterfront to modern apartments downtown and single-family residences in Wykagyl—all face stink bug pressures, especially during fall when these pests seek warm indoor shelter. The city's tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to parks like Hudson Park and Glen Island make properties particularly susceptible to seasonal stink bug invasions.

faqs.question: How much does stink bug control cost in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Stink bug control services in New Rochelle typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: When are stink bugs most active in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs are most problematic in New Rochelle during fall (September through November) when they seek indoor shelter for winter, and again in early spring when they emerge. However, indoor infestations can persist year-round if not properly treated.

faqs.question: How do I prevent stink bugs from entering my New Rochelle home?
faqs.answer: Seal cracks and gaps around windows, doors, siding, and foundations. Install or repair window screens, use door sweeps, and seal utility penetrations. Our technicians can identify and treat vulnerable entry points during our comprehensive inspection and exclusion services.

faqs.question: Are stink bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied according to label instructions. Our technicians are fully licensed and trained in safe pest control practices, and we can accommodate requests for eco-friendly treatment options.
